_comment: Expected system behavior per deal. Derived from the brief's test table; RECONCILE the bands against 00_ANSWER_KEY.md once the answer key is in place. Rule: the set of flags that fire for a deal must EXACTLY equal flags_expected — any extra flag is a false-positive failure. Bands assert score ranges on a given call (default: latest call).

Lakeshore Fintech._comment: Health asserted on the elements the model scores stably (decision_criteria, identify_pain, champion all land high every run). economic_buyer is intentionally NOT banded here — it swings 4-7 run to run, and the real health guarantee for this control deal is flags_expected: [] (stays clean).

NovaWorks._comment: The signature flag firing IS the assertion. No exact paper_process band — the model scores it on the 3/4 boundary, so an exact band is fragile; the < 5 flag threshold gives margin.
